success_factors: Workflow reached terminal status `success` and executed all planned nodes: download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize.
Repository ingestion succeeded via zip fallback and AST-based analysis identified core modules/classes/functions despite non-packaged project structure.
MCP plugin artifacts were generated consistently (startup script, adapter, service, README, requirements).
Generated MCP service health check passed (`healthy`) with stdio transport, indicating runnable baseline service.
No runtime errors or warnings were recorded in workflow logs.
failure_reasons: DeepWiki analysis failed (external analysis subsystem), reducing enrichment depth but not blocking generation.
Original project tests did not pass (or were effectively absent), limiting confidence in behavioral equivalence of exposed tools.
Metrics collection appears incomplete/instrumented as zero (files processed/performance metrics), which impairs diagnostic fidelity.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; repository imported via zip fallback. Timing per-node not provided, but overall pipeline remained within ~207s.
node_performance.analysis_time: Static/AST analysis succeeded and extracted actionable module inventory; DeepWiki sub-step failed but did not block progression.
node_performance.generation_time: Generation completed with 7 files created and import-mode adapter; endpoint exposure appears function-rich.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin health test passed quickly (startup_time=0 reported), while original project test status is not reliable due to absent test suite artifacts.
